exec_args.query: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';

args.query:
SELECT "Index", COUNT(*) AS total_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days
FROM index_trade
WHERE "Date" >= '2018-01-01' AND "Date" < '2019-01-01'
GROUP BY "Index";

exec_args.sql:
SELECT "Index", COUNT(*) AS total_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days
FROM index_trade
WHERE "Date" >= '2018-01-01' AND "Date" < '2019-01-01'
GROUP BY "Index";

args.code:
import json
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame(var_call_KyxKcptRG2AIbfTowrX8h2ry)
for c in ['total_days','up_days','down_days']:
    df[c] = pd.to_numeric(df[c])

# North America indices present in dataset: IXIC (NASDAQ Composite, US), NYA (NYSE Composite, US), GSPTSE (S&P/TSX Composite, Canada)
na = df[df['Index'].isin(['IXIC','NYA','GSPTSE'])].copy()
na['more_up_than_down'] = na['up_days'] > na['down_days']
res = na[na['more_up_than_down']].sort_values('Index')[['Index','up_days','down_days','total_days']].to_dict(orient='records')
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(res))

val_args.code:
import json
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame(var_call_KyxKcptRG2AIbfTowrX8h2ry)
for c in ['total_days','up_days','down_days']:
    df[c] = pd.to_numeric(df[c])

# North America indices present in dataset: IXIC (NASDAQ Composite, US), NYA (NYSE Composite, US), GSPTSE (S&P/TSX Composite, Canada)
na = df[df['Index'].isin(['IXIC','NYA','GSPTSE'])].copy()
na['more_up_than_down'] = na['up_days'] > na['down_days']
res = na[na['more_up_than_down']].sort_values('Index')[['Index','up_days','down_days','total_days']].to_dict(orient='records')
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(res))
